description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a distinctive, elongated barrel and a robust, metallic frame. The grip panels are textured with a diamond-checkered pattern and appear to be made of a dark brown material, likely wood or a synthetic polymer, providing a secure hold. The frame and slide are matte gray, with visible mechanical details such as the trigger, trigger guard, and slide lock. The trigger guard is rounded and thick, offering ample space for finger placement. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending well beyond the frame, and the muzzle is clearly visible from the front. There are no prominent engravings or markings visible on the slide, and the magazine base is flat and flush with the grip.
description: A matte gray semi-automatic handgun with a long barrel and dark brown checkered grip panels. The design is robust, with a rounded trigger guard and a flat magazine base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the checkered brown grip, and the mechanical details of the frame and slide.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal detail visible on the grip or slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, slide, and barrel, mirroring the details seen in view 0 but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the slide, with the width of the frame and grip visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features a pronounced diamond-checkered pattern, providing a textured, non-slip surface. It is contoured to fit the hand comfortably, with a slight palm swell and rounded edges. The material appears to be dark brown, resembling wood or a high-quality synthetic, and is secured with visible fasteners. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or additional embellishments, giving it a classic and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and rounded, with a thick profile that offers ample protection for the trigger. It is smoothly contoured without any undercuts or squared-off edges, and there are no visible texturing or integrated accessories. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing durability and ease of use.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending significantly beyond the frame, with a smooth, matte finish. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the profile is consistent along its length. The muzzle is clean and unadorned, with no external markings or features.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and matte, lacking manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests. It is simple in design, lacking any visible logos, texturing, or embellishments, contributing to the streamlined appearance of the handgun.
